recommendations.title: Abominable
recommendations.overview: A group of misfits encounter a young Yeti named Everest, and they set off to reunite the magical creature with his family on the mountain of his namesake.

recommendations.title: Herbie Goes Bananas
recommendations.overview: The adorable little VW helps its owners break up a counterfeiting ring in Mexico.

recommendations.title: The Water Horse
recommendations.overview: A lonely boy discovers a mysterious egg that hatches a sea creature of Scottish legend.

recommendations.title: Orion and the Dark
recommendations.overview: A boy with an active imagination faces his fears on an unforgettable journey through the night with his new friend: a giant, smiling creature named Dark.

recommendations.title: Free Willy: Escape from Pirate's Cove
recommendations.overview: After young Kirra leaves her Australian home to summer with her grandfather in South Africa, she soon discovers a baby orca stranded in the lagoon near her grandfather’s rundown seaside amusement park. She names the lonely whale Willy--and embarks on

recommendations.title: The Little Mermaid
recommendations.overview: A young reporter and his niece discover a beautiful and enchanting creature they believe to be the real little mermaid.

recommendations.title: Pinocchio
recommendations.overview: A wooden puppet embarks on a thrilling adventure to become a real boy.

recommendations.title: Dr. Dolittle 3
recommendations.overview: Lisa Dolittle sends her daughter to 'Durango', a Dude Ranch, to find herself. While there, she uses her talent to talk to the animals in order to save Durango from being taken over by a neighboring Ranch.

recommendations.title: The Indian in the Cupboard
recommendations.overview: A nine-year-old boy gets a plastic Indian and a cupboard for his birthday and finds himself involved in adventure when the Indian comes to life and befriends him.

recommendations.title: Mia and the White Lion
recommendations.overview: A young girl from London moves to Africa with her parents where she befriends a lion cub.
